records.description: Utrecht says its Microsoft offering includes Copilot, but explicitly discourages student use while safe AI tooling is still being arranged.
records.howToObtain: Included in the UU Microsoft offering; students are directed to follow UU AI conditions of use and note that UU discourages Copilot use.

evidence.sourceTitle: Conditions of use of AI tools by students - Utrecht University
evidence.evidenceSnippet: The Microsoft offering from UU includes Copilot, but UU discourages using Copilot.

records.description: RWTHgpt is RWTH Aachen University's AI chatbot based on KI:connect, offering central access to generative AI models and applications.
records.howToObtain: Open the KI:connect web interface, select RWTH, and log in through RWTH Single Sign-On.

evidence.sourceTitle: KI:connect / RWTHgpt - IT Center Help - RWTH Aachen University
evidence.evidenceSnippet: RWTHgpt is the AI chatbot for RWTH Aachen University, based on KI:connect. With RWTHgpt, members of the RWTH Aachen University community can chat directly with an artificial intelligence system.

evidence.sourceTitle: KI:connect / RWTHgpt - IT Center Help - RWTH Aachen University
evidence.evidenceSnippet: Persons with the status Student RWTH, Employee RWTH or Employee FB10 are authorized to access the RWTHgpt service.

records.description: DTU-approved Microsoft AI assistant for questions, text generation, analysis, emails, reports, and work-tool assistance.
records.howToObtain: Log in with a DTU account and verify the green shield before use.

evidence.sourceTitle: Choose your AI tool - DTU Inside
evidence.evidenceSnippet: The AI-tools listed below are approved by AIT. Copilot Chat is available to all at DTU, both employees and students.

evidence.sourceTitle: Choose your AI tool - DTU Inside
evidence.evidenceSnippet: Copilot Chat is safe to use when you are logged in with your DTU account and see the green shield. DTU has a data processing agreement with Microsoft.

records.description: DTU-approved licensed Copilot tier integrated into Microsoft 365 apps such as Outlook, Word, PowerPoint, Excel, and Teams.
records.howToObtain: Manager approval, unit-funded license, and mandatory Copilot 365 onboarding e-learning are required before activation.
records.costToUser: The unit pays for the license.

evidence.sourceTitle: Choose your AI tool - DTU Inside
evidence.evidenceSnippet: Copilot 365 is the big brother compared to Copilot Chat and therefore requires an additional license.

evidence.sourceTitle: Choose your AI tool - DTU Inside
evidence.evidenceSnippet: A license must be approved by your immediate manager, as the unit pays for the license. Before the license can be activated, the employee must have completed and passed the mandatory e-learning course.

records.description: DTU-approved trial-phase tool for designing custom AI assistants and automation solutions.
records.howToObtain: Contact IT Innovation in AIT through IT Support with a strong use case to participate in the trial.

evidence.sourceTitle: Choose your AI tool - DTU Inside
evidence.evidenceSnippet: Copilot Studio is in a trial phase, but if you have a strong use case, you can contact IT Innovation in AIT through IT Support to participate in testing the tool.

records.description: DTU-approved platform for advanced AI development and testing, including model work, data analysis, and intelligent solutions.
records.howToObtain: Request license purchase through the DTU Service Portal under License Consulting; an Azure subscription and manager approval are required.
records.costToUser: The unit pays for the license.

evidence.sourceTitle: Choose your AI tool - DTU Inside
evidence.evidenceSnippet: Azure AI Foundry is a platform for advanced AI development and testing, where you can work with AI models, analyze data, and build intelligent solutions.

evidence.sourceTitle: Choose your AI tool - DTU Inside
evidence.evidenceSnippet: A license must be approved by your immediate manager, as the unit pays for the license. The unit must also have an Azure Subscription for the license to work.

records.description: Queen Mary-supported Microsoft 365 AI tool for staff, positioned as the secure institutional option for AI exploration and use.
records.howToObtain: Access through Queen Mary University credentials.

evidence.sourceTitle: Staff Guide to Generative AI - Queen Mary University of London
evidence.evidenceSnippet: All Queen Mary staff have access to Microsoft Copilot through their University credentials. This platform is integrated within our Microsoft 365 environment.

evidence.sourceTitle: Staff Guide to Generative AI - Queen Mary University of London
evidence.evidenceSnippet: Use Microsoft Copilot when working with sensitive, confidential, or internal-use-only information.

records.description: UW-Madison-vetted AI chatbot for productivity, text, translation, questions, images, and code under UW account protections.
records.howToObtain: Launch Google Gemini and sign in with a UW NetID.

evidence.sourceTitle: Generative AI Services at UW-Madison: Tools, Policies & Resources
evidence.evidenceSnippet: UW-Madison has vetted and secured contracts for the generative AI services below. These tools are available university-wide for free.

evidence.sourceTitle: Generative AI Services at UW-Madison: Tools, Policies & Resources
evidence.evidenceSnippet: Google Gemini is an AI chatbot designed to enhance productivity and creativity through natural language interactions.

records.description: UW-Madison Copilot Chat access through Microsoft 365 with NetID sign-in and enterprise data protections.
records.howToObtain: Use Copilot Chat on the web or in Microsoft 365 apps with a UW NetID.

evidence.sourceTitle: Generative AI Services at UW-Madison: Tools, Policies & Resources
evidence.evidenceSnippet: Copilot Chat is available to all university students and employees as part of your UW-Madison Microsoft 365 account.

evidence.sourceTitle: Generative AI Tools Available at UW-Madison
evidence.evidenceSnippet: Microsoft Copilot Chat | A secure AI chatbot for writing and explaining things | Web and app chat with enterprise protections when signed in with your UW account.

records.description: UW-Madison Google account tool for working with uploaded documents and other digital content with source-grounded outputs.
records.howToObtain: Launch NotebookLM through the UW Google account.

evidence.sourceTitle: Generative AI Services at UW-Madison: Tools, Policies & Resources
evidence.evidenceSnippet: NotebookLM is an AI-powered notebook designed to help you understand and work with your uploaded documents and other digital content.

evidence.sourceTitle: Generative AI Services at UW-Madison: Tools, Policies & Resources
evidence.evidenceSnippet: NotebookLM is included with your UW-Madison Google account.

records.description: UW-Madison-supported no-code platform for building Gemini-powered agents that automate tasks across Google Workspace.
records.howToObtain: Sign in with NetID and open the Workspace Studio icon in UW-Madison Google Drive.

evidence.sourceTitle: Generative AI Tools Available at UW-Madison
evidence.evidenceSnippet: Google Workspace Studio | No-code platform for building Gemini-powered agents that automate tasks across Google Workspace.

evidence.sourceTitle: Generative AI Tools Available at UW-Madison
evidence.evidenceSnippet: Access: Sign in with your NetID and open the Workspace Studio icon in the top-right corner of your UW-Madison Google Drive.

records.description: UW-Madison Zoom AI feature set for meeting summaries, action items, meeting Q&A, and third-party meeting note-taking.
records.howToObtain: Enable host opt-in Zoom AI Companion features in UW Zoom.

evidence.sourceTitle: Generative AI Services at UW-Madison: Tools, Policies & Resources
evidence.evidenceSnippet: Zoom AI Companion can automatically create meeting summaries, identify action items and quickly answer questions about what happened during meetings.

evidence.sourceTitle: Generative AI Tools Available at UW-Madison
evidence.evidenceSnippet: Use Zoom AI Companion (host must opt in) or Webex AI Assistant. Each provides summaries and action items when hosts turn AI features on.

records.description: UW-Madison-supported Cisco Webex AI meeting tool for real-time translation, transcription, voice commands, and summaries.
records.howToObtain: Use supported Webex AI Assistant features in UW Webex.

evidence.sourceTitle: Generative AI Services at UW-Madison: Tools, Policies & Resources
evidence.evidenceSnippet: Webex AI Assistant is an AI-powered meeting tool that offers real-time translation, transcription, voice commands and post-meeting summaries.

evidence.sourceTitle: Generative AI Tools Available at UW-Madison
evidence.evidenceSnippet: Webex AI Assistant | Meeting-focused AI for summaries and key points | Summaries, action items, real-time insights in meetings.

records.description: UW-Madison-listed creative image generation and text-effects tool with Adobe commercial-safety positioning.
records.howToObtain: Use UW-provided Adobe Firefly access; support is through Adobe rather than a dedicated campus support team.

evidence.sourceTitle: Generative AI Tools Available at UW-Madison
evidence.evidenceSnippet: Adobe Firefly | Creative image generation and text effects | Commercially safer image generation.

evidence.sourceTitle: Generative AI Tools Available at UW-Madison
evidence.evidenceSnippet: Support: Adobe (vendor). UW provides access, but there is no dedicated campus Firefly support team.

records.description: UW-Madison pay-as-you-go cloud AI service for building AI applications using foundation models.
records.howToObtain: Available to faculty and staff through UW-Madison public cloud access; risk assessment is required before sensitive or restricted data use.

evidence.sourceTitle: Generative AI Services at UW-Madison: Tools, Policies & Resources
evidence.evidenceSnippet: These enterprise AI services are available to university faculty and staff on a pay-as-you-go basis. Amazon Web Services (AWS) Bedrock.

evidence.sourceTitle: Generative AI Services at UW-Madison: Tools, Policies & Resources
evidence.evidenceSnippet: Amazon Bedrock is a cloud service that makes it easy to build AI applications using foundation models from leading AI companies.

records.description: UW-Madison pay-as-you-go GCP AI services with access to foundation models including Claude and Mixtral.
records.howToObtain: Available to faculty and staff through GCP; Cybersecurity evaluation is required for sensitive or restricted data uses.

evidence.sourceTitle: Generative AI Services at UW-Madison: Tools, Policies & Resources
evidence.evidenceSnippet: Google Cloud Platform (GCP) offers cloud computing resources and access to more than 90 foundation models, such as Claude from Anthropic and Mixtral from Mistral AI.

evidence.sourceTitle: Generative AI Services at UW-Madison: Tools, Policies & Resources
evidence.evidenceSnippet: GCP is available to faculty and staff but requires Cybersecurity evaluation for uses involving sensitive or restricted data.

records.description: UW-Madison Azure cloud AI service with OpenAI API access for faculty and staff.
records.howToObtain: Request UW-Madison Azure AI access; Cybersecurity and public cloud risk assessment are required before sensitive or restricted data use.

evidence.sourceTitle: Generative AI Services at UW-Madison: Tools, Policies & Resources
evidence.evidenceSnippet: UW-Madison's Azure service offers cloud computing resources, including access to OpenAI's API, for processing and storing public or internal data.

evidence.sourceTitle: Generative AI Services at UW-Madison: Tools, Policies & Resources
evidence.evidenceSnippet: It's available to faculty and staff but requires Cybersecurity evaluation for uses involving sensitive or restricted data.

records.description: St Andrews-provided AI tool for staff and students, with Commercial Data Protection enabled.
records.howToObtain: Use the university-provided Microsoft Copilot service; consult IT guidelines for access details.

evidence.sourceTitle: Generative AI - FAQs for students - University of St Andrews
evidence.evidenceSnippet: The University's provided AI tool is Microsoft Copilot. This is available to all staff and students, with Commercial Data Protection services enabled.
